name: Kapusta z Wieprzowina - Polish Sauerkraut Wit
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Neck bones or spare ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the meat and chop it into pieces.
2. Brown the meat in lard, adding quartered onions, minced garlic, allspice, bay leaf, whole peppers, and celery seeds.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Pour boiling water over the meat until covered, then cook until the meat is partially cooked.
5. Remove one cup of the liquid for gravy.
6. Add sauerkraut, caraway seeds, minced apple, and barley. Continue cooking until the meat is tender.
7. Serve with raw potato dumplings and gravy.
